plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: This app reads your steps, sleep, and workouts so your timeline reflects what actually happened.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: If you turn on Apple Health export in Settings, this app writes the workouts you log here to Health — activity type and start/end time only, never a modeled calorie estimate.

plugins.cameraPermission: Scan a barcode or photograph a meal to log it.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Record your route while you log an outdoor session. The app cannot see your location except during a session you started, and your route stays on your device.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Record your route while you log an outdoor session. The app cannot see your location except during a session you started, and your route stays on your device.
